economic_notes: Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership (OFNLP) distributions of $2,097,531 received. Wataynikaneyap Power LP deferred revenue noted. Economic Development Corporation referenced in cash balances.
notes: Audit is qualified on two bases: (1) PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations not yet assessed by management; (2) incomplete inventory of tangible capital assets — not all major asset classes fully recognized per PS 3150. Two consolidated subsidiaries: Eabametoong First Nation Housing Authority Inc. and Eabametoong Communications Inc. Net debt position of ($183,980) per statement of changes in net debt. Capital lease obligations of $506,381 also outstanding. Long-term debt includes ISC promissory note tied to land claim settlement. Budget figures in statements are on modified accrual basis. No schedule of remuneration included in the provided financial statement text. Annual debt service reflects only long-term debt repayment per cash flow statement; capital lease payments of $72,518 additional. isc_funding reflects revenue recognized from ISC per deferred revenue note; total_government_transfers = federal $39,849,370 + provincial $6,794,450. osr = total revenue $58,931,456 minus government transfers $46,643,820.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
